data.en: I got my passport last month, and the visa will come next week.
data.cn: 我上个月拿到了护照，签证下周就会发下来。
data.hint: 注意前半句是一般过去时，后半句是一般将来时。
accept: The visa will come next week, and I got my passport last month.

data.en: I'm travelling around Europe for two weeks with my aunt and uncle.
data.cn: 我正打算和我的姨妈及姨夫在欧洲旅行两周。
data.hint: 现在进行时在此处表示按计划或安排即将发生的动作。
accept: With my aunt and uncle, I'm travelling around Europe for two weeks.

data.en: Do you have your passport and visa already?
data.cn: 你已经拿到护照和签证了吗？
data.hint: 这是一个助动词 Do 开头的一般疑问句。
accept: Do you already have your passport and visa?
Do you already have your visa and passport?
Do you have your visa and passport already?

data.en: We're renting a car and driving!
data.cn: 我们打算租一辆车并自驾游！
data.hint: 现在进行时表示已经计划好的未来行动。
accept: We're driving and renting a car!

data.en: I'm not packing until the day after tomorrow.
data.cn: 我直到后天才会收拾行李。
data.hint: not...until 结构表示“直到...才”。
accept: Until the day after tomorrow, I'm not packing.

data.en: He is applying for a credit card next Tuesday.
data.cn: 他下周二要申请一张信用卡。
data.hint: apply for 表示“申请”，进行时态表示计划好的将来事宜。
accept: Next Tuesday, he is applying for a credit card.

data.en: What do you need to do to prepare for the trip?
data.cn: 你需要做什么来为这次旅行做准备？
data.hint: need to do sth. 表示“需要做某事”，prepare for 表示“为...准备”。
accept: To prepare for the trip, what do you need to do?

data.en: I've just finished the travel arrangements!
data.cn: 事实上，我刚刚完成了旅行安排！
data.hint: 现在完成时，just 放在助动词 have/has 之后。

data.en: We're bringing sweaters and coats with us, so I hope we'll be OK.
data.cn: 我们会带上毛衣和外套，所以我希望我们能没事的。
data.hint: bring sth. with sb. 随身携带某物，so 连接结果状语从句。
accept: We're bringing coats and sweaters with us, so I hope we'll be OK.

data.en: I'll see you in a few days!
data.cn: 几天后见！
data.hint: in a few days 表示“几天之后”，常用于一般将来时。
accept: In a few days, I'll see you!

data.en: I'd like to buy a plane ticket from London to Paris.
data.cn: 我想买一张从伦敦到巴黎的机票。
data.hint: would like to do sth. 表示“想要做某事”。
accept: From London to Paris, I'd like to buy a plane ticket.

data.en: On what date are you travelling?
data.cn: 请问您哪天出行？
data.hint: 疑问代词 what 修饰 date 构成介词短语提前。

data.en: Would you like to travel business class or economy?
data.cn: 请问您想购买商务舱还是经济舱？
data.hint: 这是由 or 连接的选择疑问句。
accept: Would you like to travel economy or business class?

data.en: Would you like to book a return flight this time?
data.cn: 请问您这次需要订往返机票吗？
data.hint: book a return flight 预订往返航班。

data.en: No, thank you, I'm taking the train back.
data.cn: 不用了，谢谢，我打算坐火车回来。
data.hint: 此处现在进行时表示明确的未来计划。
accept: No, I'm taking the train back, thank you.

data.en: May I ask how you would like to pay?
data.cn: 请问您想如何付款？
data.hint: how 引导的宾语从句要使用陈述句语序。

data.en: There are two flights that day, one in the morning at 9:30 and the other in the afternoon at 5:00.
data.cn: 那天有两个航班，一个在上午 9:30，另一个在下午 5:00。
data.hint: one...and the other... 结构表示“一个...另一个...”。
accept: There are two flights that day, one in the afternoon at 5:00 and the other in the morning at 9:30.

data.en: I don't know if she is checking in tonight or tomorrow.
data.cn: 我不知道她是在今晚还是明天办理入住。
data.hint: if 引导宾语从句，表达“是否”。
accept: If she is checking in tonight or tomorrow, I don't know.

data.en: Are you checking out of the hotel tomorrow?
data.cn: 你明天要办理退房手续吗？
data.hint: check out of 办理退房离开宾馆。

data.en: So he decided to call and see whether we could book a farmhouse.
data.cn: 于是他决定打电话，看看我们是否能订一间农舍。
data.hint: decide to do sth. 决定做某事；whether 引导宾语从句。

data.en: The Inca emperor lived in the now-famous site Machu Picchu.
data.cn: 印加皇帝居住在如今闻名遐迩的马丘比丘遗址。
data.hint: now-famous 是复合形容词，作前置定语。

data.en: Spain took control of Peru in the 16th century and ruled until 1821.
data.cn: 西班牙在16世纪控制了秘鲁，并统治到1821年。
data.hint: take control of 意为“控制；接管”。
accept: Spain ruled until 1821 and took control of Peru in the 16th century.

data.en: It is for this reason that Spanish is the main official language of Peru.
data.cn: 正是由于这个原因，西班牙语成了秘鲁的主要官方语言。
data.hint: 这是一个强调句型：It is + 被强调部分 + that...。

data.en: Inca builders cut stones to exact sizes so that nothing was needed to hold walls together other than the perfect fit of the stones.
data.cn: 印加石匠将石头切割成精确的尺寸，因此除了石块之间的完美契合，不需要任何东西来固定墙体。
data.hint: so that 引导目的或结果状语从句，other than 表示“除...外”。
accept: So that nothing was needed to hold walls together other than the perfect fit of the stones, Inca builders cut stones to exact sizes.

data.en: Over the October holiday, my parents and I are planning to go to Xi'an to see the Terracotta Army.
data.cn: 十月国庆假期期间，我父母和我计划去西安看兵马俑。
data.hint: be planning to do sth. 计划做某事；后面跟动词不定式作目的状语。
accept: My parents and I are planning to go to Xi'an to see the Terracotta Army over the October holiday.

data.en: To me, the story of the Terracotta Army is almost unbelievable.
data.cn: 对我来说，兵马俑的故事几乎令人难以置信。
data.hint: unbelievable 是形容词，意为“难以置信的”。
accept: The story of the Terracotta Army is almost unbelievable to me.

data.en: Each statue has a different face, leading researchers to believe that each one is a copy of a real soldier.
data.cn: 每座雕像都有不同的面孔，这使得研究人员认为每一座都是真实士兵的复制品。
data.hint: 现在分词短语 leading... 在句中作伴随或结果状语。
accept: Leading researchers to believe that each one is a copy of a real soldier, each statue has a different face.

data.en: No one in modern times knew about the tomb or the terracotta statues until 1974.
data.cn: 直到1974年，现代人才知道这座陵墓或这些兵马俑的存在。
data.hint: not/no...until 结构，直到...才。
accept: Until 1974, no one in modern times knew about the tomb or the terracotta statues.

data.en: A short flight from Cusco takes you from the Andes into the Amazon rainforest.
data.cn: 从库斯科乘飞机很快就能把你从安第斯山脉带到亚马逊雨林。
data.hint: take sb. from... into... 把某人从...带入...。

data.en: One of the interesting questions of history is how the Incas lived without shopping!
data.cn: 历史上有趣的问题之一就是印加人是如何在不购物的情况下生活的！
data.hint: how 引导表语从句，从句使用陈述句语序；without 后跟动名词。

data.en: If you want to leave a mark on the world, do it by changing someone's life with kindness and love.
data.cn: 如果你想在世界上留下印记，请通过用善良和爱改变他人的生活来实现。
data.hint: If 引导条件状语从句，主句是祈使句，by + 动名词表达方式。
accept: Do it by changing someone's life with kindness and love if you want to leave a mark on the world.

data.en: Another big problem in some places has been tourists disturbing the local people and life.
data.cn: 在某些地方，另一个大问题一直是游客打扰当地人的生活和常态。
data.hint: 现在完成时态表示过去发生的动作一直持续到现在。
accept: Tourists disturbing the local people and life has been another big problem in some places.

data.en: Some tourists wander around and take pictures of local people without asking for their permission.
data.cn: 有些游客四处闲逛，在未征得允许的情况下拍摄当地人。
data.hint: take pictures of 拍照；without 后跟动名词短语。
accept: Without asking for their permission, some tourists wander around and take pictures of local people.
Some tourists take pictures of local people and wander around without asking for their permission.

data.en: Some tourists love to party there late into the night, making it difficult for locals to sleep.
data.cn: 一些游客喜欢在那里派对到深夜，这使得当地人很难入睡。
data.hint: making 现在分词短语作结果状语，it 是形式宾语，to sleep 是真正宾语。
accept: Making it difficult for locals to sleep, some tourists love to party there late into the night.

data.en: Have fun in a way that does not disturb others.
data.cn: 以一种不打扰别人的方式享受快乐。
data.hint: that 引导定语从句修饰先行词 way。

data.en: The only way to solve the problem of the terrible tourist is to make sure that you are not one!
data.cn: 解决糟糕游客问题的唯一方法就是确保你不是其中之一！
data.hint: 动词不定式 to solve 作后置定语，to make sure 作表语，that 引导宾语从句。
accept: To make sure that you are not one is the only way to solve the problem of the terrible tourist!

data.en: Be the best, kindest, most polite tourist possible.
data.cn: 尽最大可能做一个最棒、最善良、最懂礼貌的游客。
data.hint: 这是祈使句，使用了形容词最高级形式来修饰名词。

data.en: Remember, whenever you step outside your country's borders, you are representing your country to the rest of the world.
data.cn: 记住，每当你踏出本国国境时，你都代表着你的国家面对世界的其他地方。
data.hint: whenever 引导让步状语从句；进行时态表示当下的状态或象征性行为。
accept: Whenever you step outside your country's borders, remember, you are representing your country to the rest of the world.

data.en: Tourism can be both good and bad.
data.cn: 旅游业既可以是好事，也可以是坏事。
data.hint: both...and... 表示“既...又...”。
accept: Tourism can be both bad and good.

data.en: Thousands of tourist sites are being destroyed by tourists who love them to death.
data.cn: 数以千计的旅游景点正在被那些“爱它们爱到骨子里”的游客所毁灭。
data.hint: 现在进行时的被动语态：are being destroyed；who 引导定语从句。

data.en: Pisa is a fine old city.
data.cn: 比萨是一座漂亮的老城。
data.hint: 常规的主系表结构短句。

data.en: This gives the place an air of wonderful quietness, which is very pleasant.
data.cn: 这赋予了这个地方一种奇妙的宁静氛围，让人感到十分惬意。
data.hint: which 引导非限制性定语从句修饰前面的主句或先行词 quietness。
accept: Which is very pleasant, this gives the place an air of wonderful quietness.

data.en: It leans so far on one side that if you dropped a stone from the top, it would fall sixteen feet from the base of the tower.
data.cn: 它向一侧倾斜得很厉害，如果你从顶部丢下一块石头，它会落在距离塔底16英尺远的地方。
data.hint: so...that 引导结果状语从句，其中包含 if 虚拟语气条件句（从句用过去时，主句用 would + 动词原形）。
accept: If you dropped a stone from the top, it leans so far on one side that it would fall sixteen feet from the base of the tower.

data.en: Anyone with eyes can see that the columns on one side have sunk rather far.
data.cn: 任何有眼睛的人都能看出来，一侧的柱子已经沉降得相当厉害了。
data.hint: that 引导宾语从句；have sunk 是现在完成时形式。
accept: That the columns on one side have sunk rather far, anyone with eyes can see.

data.en: These leaning towers are not uncommon in Italy.
data.cn: 这些倾斜的塔在意大利并不少见。
data.hint: not uncommon 双重否定表肯定，意为“相当常见”。

data.en: The Italians are so fond of poetry that many of them have memorised the best parts of their great poets.
data.cn: 意大利人是如此热爱诗歌，以至于他们中的许多人都背诵了他们伟大诗人最精彩的篇章。
data.hint: be fond of 喜欢；so...that... 引导结果状语从句。
accept: Many of them have memorised the best parts of their great poets because the Italians are so fond of poetry.

data.en: For short city trips, I walk or take buses to see local life.
data.cn: 对于城市短途旅行，我步行或坐公交车去体验当地生活。
data.hint: 介词短语提前作状语，动词不定式 to see 作目的状语。
accept: To see local life, I walk or take buses for short city trips.
For short city trips, I take buses or walk to see local life.

data.en: For long-distance trips between cities, trains are my favourite.
data.cn: 对于城市之间的长途旅行，火车是 my favourite（我的最爱）。
data.hint: favourite 采用英国英语拼写（含 u）。
accept: Trains are my favourite for long-distance trips between cities.

data.en: You can sit back and watch the countryside outside the window.
data.cn: 你可以闲坐着，欣赏窗外的乡村风光。
data.hint: 情态动词 can 后面接两个并列的动词原形 sit 和 watch。
accept: You can watch the countryside outside the window and sit back.

data.en: My camera is a must.
data.cn: 我的相机是必带之物。
data.hint: a must 在这里作名词，意思是“不可或缺的事物/必不可少的东西”。
